original_snippet_context: Discussion of economic crises in Argentina and potential ministerial disputes related to exchange rates.
relevant_quote: A crise economica na Argentina prolonga-se e aggrava-se e o próprio presidenle provoca a demissão do ministério, pois esta disputavão o commissarial-o de fundos em cambio.
justification: This mentions an economic crisis and a dispute over exchange-related funds in Argentina, providing context but no direct mention of Brazil's Caixa de Conversão or a clear stance on its proposed implementation.
